title: AI is rewriting entry level work. Is it also erasing the leadership pipeline?
description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing entry-level work, automating routine tasks and reshaping hiring decisions. But in chasing productivity gains, are companies quietly dismantling the talent pipeline that produces tomorrow's managers, innovators and CEOs?
content:

title: Anthropic in talks with Samsung for a potential AI chip collaboration: Report
